title: dalbergia ovalis
intro: Dalbergia ovalis, also known as the "Palo Verde," is a tropical plant species native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia, characterized by its small, yellow flowers and compound leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Dalbergia ovalis include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting overall well-being. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate various health conditions.
